title: IOWODO Smart Watch for Women (Answer/Make Calls），1.91" HD Fitness Watch with Flashlight/Step Counter/110+ Sport Modes/Heart Rate/Sleep Monitor/SpO2/IP68 Waterproof/Tracker，Smartwatch for Android iOS
features: 【Multi-function LED Flashlight Watch】 This smartwatch features a convenient design: the flashlight turns on and off with one click, eliminating the need to carry additional lighting tools. This smart watch combines precise timekeeping with a high-brightness LED flashlight, making it a perfect companion for those in dark environments. The watch boasts a battery life of up to 6-7 days (in daily use), and the flashlight provides 10-20 hours of continuous use.

【Newly Improved Bluetooth Calling Version】 The IOWODO 2025 upgraded smartwatch is equipped with the latest single-chip processor, a built-in highly responsive microphone, and high-fidelity speakers. You can make and receive calls directly from the watch, view call logs, and add favorite contacts. Additionally, vibration alerts and notification displays ensure you never miss a message from Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, or WhatsApp.

【110+ Training Modes and IP68 Waterproof Rating】 Choose from over 110 different training modes on your smartwatch, including yoga, cycling, running, hiking, walking, mountaineering, rugby, fitness, yoga, badminton, tennis, and more. This smartwatch tracks your training in detail, including steps, calories burned, distance traveled, and other important fitness information.This smart watch for women boasts an IP68 waterproof rating, providing enhanced water resistance. Note: Shower/bath, sauna, hot springs and diving are not supported.

【Comprehensive Health Monitoring】This smartwatch monitors your heart rate, blood oxygen saturation, sleep quality, and stress levels 24/7. You'll get a clear view of your heart rate, blood oxygen levels, and nighttime sleep quality analysis. It includes a variety of health features to protect your well-being. Additionally, it features a sensitive activity tracker that automatically monitors your sleep patterns (including deep sleep, light sleep, and wakefulness) during sleep, providing a comprehensive analysis of your sleep, helping you start sleeping better.

【1.91-inch HD Display and Customizable Watch Faces】 The 1.91-inch HD display with a crisp 240*284 resolution delivers crystal-clear visuals for an immersive experience. Easily personalize your smartwatch with a wide range of customizable watch faces to suit your style for any occasion—whether fashionable, artistic, or minimalist—making it an ideal choice for casual, sporty, or professional wear. Its sleek, modern design complements any outfit, seamlessly blending technology and fashion, making it an ideal everyday wearer.

【Built-in voice assistant and Compatibility】 This watch also boasts a wealth of practical features, including a smart voice assistant, music and camera controls, weather display, sedentary reminder, alarm clock, stopwatch, and more. This smartwatch is compatible with Android 4.4 and iOS 9.0 or higher, ensuring smooth daily connectivity and all-day convenience. More than just a timepiece, it's a stylish all-in-one wearable device that empowers you to live a smarter and healthier life. [FSC-certified case and bracelet]
